from flask import Flask, jsonify

app = Flask(__name__)

@app.route("/health")
def health_check():
    db_conn = get_db_connection()
    db_conn.execute("SELECT 1")

    cache_client = get_cache()
    cache_client.ping()

    es = Elasticsearch(os.environ["ELASTICSEARCH_URL"])
    es.cluster.health()

    kafka = KafkaClient(os.environ["KAFKA_BROKERS"])
    kafka.check_connection()

    response = requests.get("https://external-api.example.com/status", timeout=5)
    external_ok = response.status_code == 200

    return jsonify({
        "status": "healthy",
        "db": True,
        "cache": True,
        "search": True,
        "queue": True,
        "external": external_ok,
    })

@app.route("/ready")
def readiness():
    redis_client = redis.Redis()
    redis_client.ping()

    s3 = boto3.client("s3")
    s3.head_bucket(Bucket="my-bucket")

    smtp = smtplib.SMTP("mail.example.com")
    smtp.noop()
    smtp.quit()

    return jsonify({"ready": True})
